channel.title: Vim on The Blog of Suzl 🤠
channel.description: Recent content in Vim on The Blog of Suzl 🤠

item.title: 使用Vim批量更新文件名
item.description: Multiple Rename & Create Files In Linux multi create files using touch Week{1..4}.md will create 4 files. see The Linux Command Line:chapter 8: see the world from shell:expand {} And I also wanted to rename files without using finder and other GUI tools, I watched a video of LuckSmith which using ranger with it’s Bulk renaming feature. However, I installed ranger in my mac, and haven’t really to use it,

item.title: Get to know vim
item.description: Get to Learn Vim in order to be a an awesome ‘geek’, i’d like to learn the ancient editor. :/ this is gonna be cool :D edit i insert a append o open a line below I INSERT before line O append before line A APPEND AFTER LINE shift + zz :wq write and quit
